Store your last 100 copied texts and lets you recopy them in one click.

A clipboard history  extension is a powerful productivity tool designed to enhance the way users manage and retrieve copied content. Such an extension can streamline workflow, improve accessibility, and reduce redundancy by storing and organizing clipboard items.

This extension seamlessly integrates with the browser, running silently in the background and capturing clipboard data whenever the user copies something. By offering an intuitive and searchable interface, it ensures users never lose important copied content, even across multiple browsing sessions.

Key Features A robust clipboard history Chrome extension typically includes the following capabilities:

- Persistent Clipboard History
- Stores copied text
- Organizes history chronologically
- All data is stored locally and not uploaded onto any servers

Install and try this free clipboard history extension now.
Enables VS Code text editing shortcuts in browser text fields, with customization.

🎉 **VS Keys – VS Code Shortcuts Anywhere ⌨️✨**
Empower your browser with VS Code text editing shortcuts—enhance productivity in any text field, everywhere!

---

🔍 **Overview**
VS Keys transforms your Chrome browser into a productivity powerhouse by bringing the best Visual Studio Code text editing shortcuts directly to your favorite websites. Effortlessly edit text across inputs, textareas, and rich text editors with familiar, powerful shortcuts. Ideal for developers, writers, and anyone who loves VS Code efficiency.

---

🚀 **Key Features**

🔹 **Full VS Code Shortcut Suite:**
• Cut, Copy, Paste Lines and Selections
• Move, Duplicate, Delete Lines
• Smart Indentation & Commenting
• Advanced Text Selection and Navigation
• Case Transformations (uppercase, lowercase, title case)
• Whitespace Trimming

🔹 **Customizable Shortcuts:**
• Toggle or remap shortcuts globally
• Fine-tune shortcuts per website (avoid conflicts)

🔹 **Per-Site Control (New!):**
• Individually enable or disable shortcuts for specific websites
• Set unique keybindings per website

🔹 **Intuitive Visual Feedback:**
• Subtle notifications confirm your actions (e.g., "Line Copied", "Uppercased")

🔹 **Mac & Windows Friendly:**
• Native support and correct symbols for Mac (⌘, ⌥, ⇧) and Windows shortcuts

🔹 **Performance Optimized:**
• Lightweight, non-intrusive, built for speed and efficiency

---

🧩 **Getting Started**
1️⃣ Install **VS Keys** from the Chrome Web Store
2️⃣ Start editing instantly using VS Code shortcuts in any text field
3️⃣ Customize your experience through the intuitive settings panel

---

💖 **Why You'll Love VS Keys**
• **Consistency:** Unified editing between VS Code and your browser
• **Efficiency:** Save time on text-editing, focus more on your content
• **Flexibility:** Tailor shortcuts to your personal workflow

---

📬 **Support & Feedback**
If you run into any issues or have ideas for improvements, **please don’t leave a negative review**—instead, [open an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/alexferrari88/vskeys/issues) so we can fix it and make VS Keys better for everyone!

Report bugs, suggest features, or contribute directly via GitHub:
🔗 [https://github.com/alexferrari88/vskeys](https://github.com/alexferrari88/vskeys)

Enjoying VS Keys? Support ongoing development:
💖 [https://github.com/sponsors/alexferrari88](https://github.com/sponsors/alexferrari88)

---

🔐 **Permissions**
VS Keys requires minimal permissions:
• Clipboard interactions (cut/copy/paste)
• Active tab scripting (enhance text fields)
• Storage (save your personalized settings)

---

⚡ **Boost your browsing productivity today** — install VS Keys and bring your favorite VS Code shortcuts everywhere!

⌨️✨ Made with ❤️ by Alex Ferrari
🔗 [https://github.com/alexferrari88](https://github.com/alexferrari88)
Injectable clipboard manager on any page.

The *Clipboard Widget Pro* is a practical solution for managing your clipboard. It automatically records copied text and images, displaying everything in an always-accessible side panel. It allows you to search for items, pin important content, and use the "Easy Copy" mode to extract text from any element. Fast and browser-integrated, it ensures organization, speed, and that you never lose what you've copied.
110 instant browser tools — remove backgrounds, convert files, format code and more. All private. Nothing ever leaves your browser.

kit gives you 110 instant browser tools, accessible from your toolbar, right-click menu, or keyboard shortcut. Every tool runs entirely in your browser — nothing is uploaded, nothing leaves your device.

─────────────────────────────────────
WHAT'S INSIDE
─────────────────────────────────────

IMAGE TOOLS (14)
• Background Remover — AI-powered, runs fully in-browser via ONNX Runtime
• Image Compressor — lossless & lossy, Canvas-based, no upload
• Image Converter — PNG ↔ JPG ↔ WebP ↔ AVIF, instant
• Image Resizer & Watermark — pixel-perfect output
• Colour Palette Extractor — dominant colours from any image
• EXIF Viewer, Favicon Generator, QR Code, Barcode, GPS Map, SVG Optimizer, PDF tools

TEXT & CODE (17)
• JSON, YAML, XML, TOML, GraphQL, SQL Formatters
• Base64 Encode/Decode, HTML Entities, URL Encoder
• JWT Decoder, Regex Tester, Code Formatter
• Diff Checker, Lorem Ipsum, Word Count, Character Counter

DESIGN (11)
• Gradient Generator, Gradient Mesh, CSS Box Shadow
• Border Radius, CSS Animation, Clip-Path Generator
• Colour Converter (HEX/RGB/HSL/OKLCH), Colour Blindness Simulator
• Typography Scale, Icon Finder, SVG Path Visualiser

PRODUCTIVITY (9)
• Password Generator, Pomodoro Timer, Breakpoint Tester
• Unit Converter, Timezone Converter, Unix Timestamp
• Aspect Ratio Calculator, Keyboard Shortcut Reference, Speed Test

WEB & SEO (6)
• Meta Tag Generator, OG Preview, Robots.txt Builder
• Sitemap Generator, Slug Generator, Readability Score

DATA (6)
• CSV ↔ JSON, JSON ↔ Excel, YAML ↔ JSON, TOML ↔ JSON
• Binary/Hex/Octal Visualiser, Data URL Encoder

SECURITY (2)
• Hash Generator (MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512)
• JWT Generator

DOCUMENTS (3)
• PDF Merger, PDF to Image, PDF Compressor

AUDIO / VIDEO (5)
• Audio Converter, Audio Trimmer, Video to GIF
• Text to Speech, Speech to Text

WRITING (2)
• Text to Handwriting, Markdown Table Generator

─────────────────────────────────────
HOW IT WORKS
─────────────────────────────────────

1. Click the kit icon in your toolbar — or press Alt+Shift+T
2. Search across all 110 tools with Alt+Shift+S
3. Right-click any image, text selection, or link for instant context-aware suggestions
4. Use it as a Chrome Side Panel to keep tools open while you browse

─────────────────────────────────────
PRIVACY — 100% LOCAL
─────────────────────────────────────

kit is entirely client-side. Your images, code, text, and files never leave your machine. There is no backend, no account, no analytics, no tracking. The extension stores only your list of recently used tools in Chrome's local storage.

─────────────────────────────────────
ALSO AVAILABLE AT
─────────────────────────────────────

Every tool is also available at kit.shreyannarula.com — same privacy guarantee, works on any browser.
Tải video từ Pinterest dễ dàng và nhanh chóng

Extension hỗ trợ tải video Pinterest nhanh chóng và tiện lợi. Chỉ với một cú click vào nút Download, extension sẽ tự động copy link video Pinterest bạn đang xem và dán trực tiếp vào trang snappin.app/vi
. Nhờ đó, bạn có thể lưu video Pinterest về thiết bị của mình chỉ trong vài giây, không cần thao tác thủ công phức tạp.

Nếu bạn thường xuyên muốn tải video từ Pinterest, công cụ này sẽ giúp tiết kiệm thời gian, thao tác dễ dàng, an toàn và hoàn toàn miễn phí.

Extension là lựa chọn lý tưởng để:

- Tải video Pinterest chất lượng cao.
- Lưu video Pinterest yêu thích để xem lại bất cứ lúc nào.
- Tải video từ Pinterest nhanh chóng chỉ bằng một click.
Instantly strip hidden trackers and marketing tags from any URL. Share links with true privacy

ReLink is a powerful Chrome extension designed to instantly remove hidden tracking parameters from your URLs. Say goodbye to sharing your personal data along with your links—ReLink ensures your URLs are always clean, secure, and ready to share. Stay private, keep your links short, and enjoy a seamless experience!

Key Features:

* Insta-Copy Shortcut: Press Ctrl+Shift+C to instantly copy the purified URL of your active tab.
* Context Menu Integration: Right-click any link on a webpage to clean and copy it directly from the native browser menu.
* Manual Cleanup: Easily purge dirty URLs from your clipboard using our elegant popup dashboard.
* Zero-Trust Privacy: Your data is processed 100% locally on your device with no data collection.

Enjoy secure and private link sharing with ReLink. Keep your URLs clean and your personal data safe!

SpeakQL helps analytics and growth teams write SQL 3x faster. Simply speak your query and SpeakQL will instantly transcribe your words into valid SQL code.

Churn out SQL much faster and spend less time debugging. SpeakQL fits right into your existing workflows. Activate recording with a keyboard shortcut, and the transcribed SQL code is automatically copied to clipboard.
Secure MFA token manager with encrypted vault storage.

TOTPBOX is a secure authenticator extension for managing 2FA codes in one encrypted vault.

Use it to add, organize, and quickly fill TOTP codes while keeping control of your data. Your vault is protected with a master password and encrypted with AES-256-GCM. You can import/export backups, scan QR codes from images (or camera on supported setups), and copy codes with automatic clipboard clearing for extra safety.

Key features:

Encrypted local vault for your 2FA accounts
Fast TOTP generation and one-click code copy
Auto-fill support with keyboard shortcut
Add accounts manually or by QR code
Search, edit, sort, import, and export accounts
Auto-lock, brute-force protection, and biometric unlock (supported devices)
Authentication Health dashboard with passkey upgrade guidance
Optional Pro cloud sync with end-to-end encrypted payloads
Built for users who want a focused, privacy-first authenticator without password-manager bloat.

A powerful clipboard manager with QR code generation and pinning capabilities

This clipboard manager helps you stay productive by giving you full control over your copied content. Key features include:

QR Code Generation: Instantly convert any copied text or link into a QR code for quick sharing across devices or with others.

Pinning: Keep important clipboard entries at your fingertips by pinning them to the top of your list.

Smart Sorting & Search: Automatically sort your clipboard history by date or usage frequency, and find saved items easily with built-in search.

Privacy-first: All your clipboard data is stored locally on your device. Nothing is sent to the cloud or any external server. Your content stays private and secure.

Perfect for users who value both convenience and privacy.

Wacapi is a chrome extension that helps you to track lead or sales on WhatsApp or Telegram.
A simple inventory for your prompts - saved in your own Google Drive.

Imagine this. You constructed a great personalized prompt to do a certain task, for example summarizing research articles or writing a cover letter for a job opening. 

Now every time you want to use it, you have to find the prompt, copy the text you want to use like the article or the job description, paste it into your prompt, and then copy the entire thing to finally use it. 

To get rid of these extra few steps, I built this really simple chrome extension.

Its main feature, Merge and Copy, directly solves this problem. You just copy the text you want to work on, like an article or some notes, then with a single click you can merge it with a saved prompt like '<Some thoughtfully engineered context> Summarize the following text for me:'. The full, combined prompt is copied to your clipboard, ready to go. Of course, it also works as a simple inventory for all your prompts.

The saved prompts remain completely private and secure since they are saved on your own google drive. This also means you can get your prompts back if you reinstall the extension or use it on a new computer. None of your data ever passes through my servers or is stored by me.

Multi Clip is a Chrome extension that allows you to copy and paste multiple items.
You can copy and paste up to 5 different pieces of data, each assigned to slots 1 through 5.
ClipContext — タブ横断検索対応 文脈付きクリップ保存
コピーしたテキストを出典と前後文脈ごとに自動保存し、複数タブをまたいで検索・再利用できます。

コピーするだけで、出典・前後の文脈ごと自動保存。複数タブをまたいで即座に検索。
ClipContext は、ウェブ上でテキストをコピーする瞬間に、そのテキスト・出典URL・ページタイトル・前後150文字の文脈を自動的に記録するクリップボード管理拡張機能です。「あのページのあの一節、どこだったっけ？」という悩みを根本から解決します。

★主な機能
① 文脈付き自動クリップ保存
テキストを選択してコピー（Ctrl+C）するだけで、手動操作なしに自動保存されます。保存されるのはコピーしたテキストだけでなく、その前後の文脈（前後各150文字）・ページタイトル・URL・保存日時もあわせて記録されます。リサーチ中に「何のために引用したのか」が一目で分かります。

② タブ横断テキスト検索
現在 Chrome で開いているすべてのタブの本文を横断して検索できます。キーワードを入力するだけで、どのタブに該当テキストがあるかを即座に一覧表示。クリックすると該当タブに自動ジャンプし、ページ内に黄色のハイライト表示をします。

③ PDF対応
PDF ビューアーで開いたドキュメントのテキストも自動キャプチャ。タブ検索時にはPDFタブも対象として含まれます。

④ 多彩な再利用フォーマット
保存したクリップは「テキストのみ」「テキスト＋URL」「フル形式（文脈・出典・日時を含む完全コピー）」の3形式でワンクリック再コピーが可能。メモ・レポート・引用など用途に合わせて使い分けられます。

⑤ プライバシー・セキュリティ設定
クリップデータは AES-GCM による暗号化に対応。ローカル保存モードを選択すると Google アカウントとの同期を無効化し、端末内のみにデータを保持できます。自動削除期間（7日 / 30日 / 無期限）も設定可能です。

⑥ Chrome 同期対応
デフォルトでは Chrome Sync ストレージを使用するため、同じ Google アカウントでログインした複数端末間でクリップが自動的に同期されます。

⑦ 多言語対応
日本語・英語・韓国語・中国語（簡体字・繁体字）・ロシア語に対応しています。

★インストールするメリット
リサーチ効率が大幅アップ — 調査中にコピーした情報が出典ごと自動保存されるため、後から「どこで読んだか」を探し直す手間がゼロになります。
タブを閉じても安心 — うっかりタブを閉じても、コピーしたテキストはクリップとして保存済みです。
複数タブの情報を一元管理 — 十数個のタブを行き来しながら調べるような場面でも、タブ横断検索で目的のページと情報に瞬時にアクセスできます。
引用・レポート作成が楽になる — 出典URLと前後文脈が自動保存されるため、引用元を明示した文書やレポートの作成が格段に速くなります。
プライバシーを自分でコントロール — 暗号化・ローカル保存・自動削除など、データの扱い方を細かく設定できるため、機密性の高い作業にも安心して使えます。
余計な操作が一切不要 — ブックマークや別アプリへの保存は不要。普段通りコピーするだけで、すべて自動的に蓄積されます。

★こんな方におすすめ
ウェブリサーチが多い方 / 学術論文・記事の調査をする方 / 複数タブを同時に参照しながら作業する方 / 引用元を正確に管理したい方 / ライター・研究者・学生・エンジニア

★プライバシーに関する注意
パスワード・クレジットカード番号などの機密情報はコピー（クリップ）しないでください。データの取り扱いは自己責任でお願いします。

ClipContext 変更履歴
v1.1.0 — 2026-05-11
新機能
最大保存件数の設定を追加 設定タブに「最大保存件数」セレクトボックスを追加。10 / 25 / 50 / 100 件から選択可能（デフォルト: 50件）。以前はコード内に固定値（50件）として埋め込まれていた。
パフォーマンス改善
設定のインメモリキャッシュ
background.js の設定読み込みをキャッシュ化。chrome.storage.onChanged でストレージ変更時に自動でキャッシュを破棄。クリップの保存・取得のたびに複数回走っていたストレージアクセスを大幅削減。

クリーンアップ処理のスロットリング
期限切れクリップの削除処理を最低1時間おきに制限。以前はクリップの保存・取得のたびに毎回実行していた。

ストレージアクセスの統合
設定取得を getSettings() 1回の呼び出しに集約（以前は暗号化設定・保持期間・ストレージモードを個別に4〜5回呼び出し）。Promise.all で並列取得。

ローカライズ
全6言語（ja / en_US / ko / ru / zh_CN / zh_TW）に最大保存件数ラベルを追加。
v1.0.0 — 初回リリース
Stash — Smart Clipboard for Power Users
Inline paste overlay, text expansion, smart actions, on-device encryption for secrets. Fully local — no third-party calls.

Stash turns your clipboard into a fast, searchable workspace across any site.

Stop losing things you copy. With a single shortcut, open an inline overlay and instantly find, reuse, or transform anything you’ve copied—without switching tabs or breaking your flow.

What you can do:
• Open a quick overlay anywhere to search and paste previous copies
• Expand custom snippets as you type for faster writing and coding
• Automatically recognize links, emails, code, and more
• Run smart actions like formatting text or converting data
• Secure sensitive information with on-device encryption (Vault)

Stash is designed for speed and simplicity. Everything happens locally on your device—no third-party network requests, no tracking, and no analytics.

Works across all websites so you always have your clipboard history available exactly where you need it.

Seu histórico de área de transferência organizado, foda e 100% local com o polvo mais ágil da web.

O seu histórico de área de transferência organizado, ultra-seguro e 100% local. Feito com foco em privacidade.

CLIPOCTAPLUS - CLIPBOARD MANAGER

Transforme a maneira como você lida com o famoso "Ctrl+C / Ctrl+V" com a minha extensão ClipOctaplus. Esqueça o desespero de copiar um link sem querer por cima de um texto importante e perder tudo.

POR QUE EU CRIEI O CLIPOCTAPLUS? (A História por trás)
Sabe aquela dor de perder um texto longo copiado porque você deu um "Ctrl+C" em outra coisa sem querer? Eu odiava isso. Fui procurar extensões de área de transferência, mas me frustrei: ou elas eram pesadas e travavam o navegador, ou pior, exigiam criar conta e enviavam tudo o que eu copiava para servidores na nuvem. 

Como sou meio paranoico com privacidade, decidi meter a mão na massa e criar a minha própria ferramenta, rodando estritamente no meu PC. Resolveu tanto a minha vida que meus amigos pediram para usar. O resultado ficou tão sólido que decidi subir aqui para que todo mundo tenha acesso a uma ferramenta gratuita, de qualidade e que respeita os seus dados.

A REGRA DE OURO: PRIVACIDADE ABSOLUTA
Podem ficar tranquilos: o ClipOctaplus é 100% local. Tudo o que você copia fica salvo apenas no HD do seu computador. Eu não tenho acesso, nenhuma empresa tem acesso, e os seus dados nunca saem da sua máquina. 

Quer uma prova real do foco em segurança? A extensão bloqueia automaticamente a captura de qualquer campo de senha. Se você copiar uma senha de um site, ela simplesmente não vai para o histórico do polvo. A sua privacidade vem em primeiro lugar.

PRINCIPAIS FUNCIONALIDADES:

- Filtros Inteligentes: A extensão identifica e separa automaticamente tudo o que você copia nas abas de Textos, Imagens e Números.
- Cofre Seguro (Vault): O PC é dividido com outras pessoas? Sem problemas. Mande itens sensíveis para um cofre protegido por um PIN de 4 dígitos e criptografia local.
- Faxina Automática: Você está no controle da validade. Defina por quanto tempo os dados ficam salvos (de 1 hora até "Para Sempre") e a extensão faz a limpeza automática para não lotar o seu navegador.
- Gestão Otimizada de Imagens: Copie imagens soltas pela web, visualize os previews de forma ultra-rápida e baixe várias de uma vez só em um painel dedicado.
- Menu de Contexto Sem Limites: Selecionou um texto gigante? Clique com o botão direito e envie direto para o Cofre. Eu criei um sistema que burla os limites do navegador para garantir que o seu texto seja salvo 100% íntegro.

APOIE O DESENVOLVEDOR! 🐙
Manter essa extensão atualizada, leve e com a manutenção em dia dá um trabalhão. Como este é um projeto independente e gratuito, o seu apoio faz toda a diferença. Se o ClipOctaplus está salvando o seu dia (e os seus textos), considere dar aquela força! 

Qualquer valor via Pix me ajuda a comprar aquele Monster gelado para ter energia de codar as próximas atualizações e esmagar os bugs. 

Minha Chave PIX (E-mail): lucasprado335@gmail.com

BENEFÍCIOS ADICIONAIS:

- Leveza Extrema: O código foi reescrito e cirurgicamente otimizado para não consumir a memória RAM do seu computador.
- Acessibilidade Multi-idioma: O polvo fala a sua língua! A interface se adapta automaticamente (Português, Inglês, Espanhol, Francês, Italiano, Alemão e Polonês).
- Fácil Acesso: Recupere seus itens antigos com um único clique, sem interromper o seu fluxo de navegação.

CRÉDITOS:
Criada por Lucas Prado para facilitar a sua produtividade diária e manter seus dados seguros. https://lucasprado.space/

Insert Notion-style blocks, dividers, templates, tables, and status badges into Google Docs with one click.

## Detailed Description

Docs Buddy adds Notion-style formatting to Google Docs — no copy-paste from other apps needed.

Open the side panel and insert rich, styled elements directly into your document.

WHAT YOU CAN INSERT:

- Smart Blocks (7 types): Info, Tip, Warning, Success, Note, Quote, Code — with custom color support
- Styled Dividers (11 styles): Thin/Medium/Thick lines, Dashed, Dotted, Double, Gradient, Stars, Diamonds, Dots, Wave
- Document Templates (7 templates): Meeting Notes, Pros & Cons, Project Status, Checklist, SWOT Analysis, Weekly Planner, Sprint Retrospective
- Tables: Up to 8x8 with 4 style presets (Simple, Bordered, Striped, Minimal) and optional header row
- Status Badges (5 types): Complete, In Progress, Blocked, Review, Draft — with custom labels

HOW IT WORKS:

1. Open a Google Doc
2. Click the Docs Buddy icon to open the side panel
3. Choose a tab (Blocks, Dividers, Templates, Tables, Badges)
4. Configure your element and click Insert
5. The formatted content appears in your document

FEATURES:

- Recently Used: Quick-access chips for your last 5 inserted items
- Custom Block Colors: Override preset colors with your own border and background
- Keyboard Shortcuts: Alt+1~5 to switch tabs, Ctrl+Enter to insert
- Persistent Settings: Remembers your last used tab and configurations
- Works Offline: No internet connection required

PERFECT FOR:

- Meeting facilitators who need structured notes and action items
- Project managers tracking tasks with status badges and tables
- Students organizing study notes with callout blocks and checklists
- Teams running sprint retrospectives and SWOT analyses
- Anyone who wants better-looking Google Docs without fighting formatting

PRIVACY:

- No data collection — zero network requests
- All formatting is generated locally in your browser
- No accounts, no tracking, no analytics
- Only runs on Google Docs — no access to other websites
- Full privacy policy: [URL]

OPEN SOURCE:

Docs Buddy is open source. Contributions and feedback are welcome.

## Category
Productivity

## Language
English

- Email: goodspeedhorse@gmail.com
- Location: South Korea

QR Code Scanner & Generator

QR Code Scanner and Generator Firefox Extension

This Firefox extension allows users to easily generate and scan QR codes directly from their browser. It provides a simple, user-friendly interface for quickly scanning QR codes using your camera or from images and generating QR codes from text or selected content like URLs, images, audio, and videos.

Features
QR Code Scanner:
Scan QR codes from images.
Scan QR codes using your device's camera.
QR Code Generator:
Generate QR codes from text, URLs, or any custom content.
Generate QR codes from selected text, image, video, or audio URLs via a right-click context menu.
Cross-Browser Compatibility: Works seamlessly on both types of browsers.
Context Menu Integration: Easily generate QR codes for selected text, image, video, or audio URLs directly from the right-click menu.
Easy-to-Use Interface: Simple and intuitive UI for both scanning and generating QR codes.

Installation

For Mozilla Firefox
Go to the Firefox Add-ons website and search for "QR Code Scanner and Generator" or click here to go directly to the extension page.
Click the Add to Firefox button.
Confirm by clicking Add in the popup.
Once installed, the extension icon will appear in the browser toolbar.

Usage

Scanning QR Codes
Click the extension icon in the toolbar to open the scanner.
Select an image file from your computer that contains a QR code or click the camera icon to scan a QR code using your device's camera.
The extension will automatically decode the QR code and display its content (URL, text, etc.).
If the content is a URL, you can directly click on it to open it in a new tab.

Generating QR Codes
Click the extension icon in the toolbar to open the QR code generator.
Enter the content (text, URL, etc.) you want to encode in the text box.
Click Generate QR Code.
The generated QR code will appear on the screen.
You can click to download the QR code image or copy it to the clipboard.

Generating QR Codes via Context Menu
Text: Select any text on a webpage, right-click, and select Generate QR Code from the context menu to instantly create a QR code for that text.
Image: Right-click on an image, select Generate QR Code, and the extension will generate a QR code linking to the image.
Video URL: Right-click on a video URL, and select Generate QR Code to create a QR code for that URL.
Audio URL: Right-click on an audio URL and select Generate QR Code to create a QR code for that audio file.

Features Breakdown
Scan QR codes from images: Upload or drag an image with a QR code into the extension to decode it.
Scan QR codes from your camera: Use your device's camera to scan QR codes in real time.
Generate QR codes from any content: Enter text, URL, or any other data to generate a QR code.
Context Menu Integration: Right-click on selected text, image, video, or audio URLs to generate a QR code.
Cross-platform support: The extension works on both type of browsers.

License

This extension is open-source and distributed under the MIT License.

This extension is also available for Edge Browser
https://microsoftedge.microsoft.com/addons/detail/qr-code-scanner-generat/mfnikgfcadjfkjonhcebmifiohbobjmm

Libary Used in this Project:
https://github.com/nimiq/qr-scanner
https://github.com/davidshimjs/qrcodejs
Reading support for ADHD, dyslexia & all readers. Synchronized text highlighting with text-to-speech for better focus.

Focused is an accessibility tool that helps users with ADHD, Dyslexia and fatigued readers improve reading comprehension through synchronized text highlighting and text-to-speech. It displays selected text in a floating panel with words highlighted in sync as they are read aloud.
Testudoq emergent testing with a right-click menu for exploratory tests. Create, manage, and execute missions easily.

The Testudoq Chrome extension is designed to facilitate and enhance exploratory testing through a versatile context menu that integrates seamlessly with web applications. Its primary function is to enable users to create, manage, and execute various testing scenarios directly from their browser. 

Testudoq is a powerful exploratory testing tool that integrates with your browser to streamline and automate the testing process.

Key Features and Functionality

Context Menu Integration

Purpose: Testudoq enhances the browser’s context menu, providing easy access to testing functionalities from any webpage.
Usage: Users can right-click on a webpage to access a range of testing options, including injecting values, simulating pastes, and copying content. This direct integration simplifies the testing workflow and allows for quick interactions without leaving the page.

Dynamic Testing Actions

Purpose: The extension supports various testing actions to simulate and validate user interactions with web applications.
Usage: Users can dynamically inject values into forms, simulate paste operations, and copy content to and from the clipboard. This flexibility enables comprehensive testing of form fields, input validation, and data handling processes.

Exploratory Testing Enhancements

Purpose: Testudoq aids in exploratory testing by providing tools to interact with web pages in unexpected ways, helping uncover potential issues and edge cases.
Usage: Features like the Gremlins.js integration allow users to introduce random, chaotic interactions into their tests. This helps identify vulnerabilities and test the robustness of web applications under various conditions.

User-Friendly Interface

Purpose: The extension is designed to be intuitive and easy to use, integrating seamlessly with the browser’s context menu.
Usage: Users can access testing tools directly from the right-click menu, configure testing scenarios, and execute tests with minimal setup. The options are clearly labelled and designed to be easily accessible, improving the overall user experience.

Customizable Testing Options

Purpose: Testudoq offers customizable options to tailor the testing process according to specific needs and scenarios.
Usage: Users can configure the extension’s settings to enable or disable certain features, such as clipboard access or specific testing modes. This customization allows users to adapt the tool to their testing requirements and preferences.

Support and Documentation

Purpose: The extension provides users with easy access to help resources and documentation for effective use.
Usage: A dedicated help and support page is accessible via the context menu, offering guidance on how to use the extension’s features and resolve any issues. This ensures users can quickly find the information they need to make the most of Testudoq.

Privacy and Security

Purpose: Testudoq is designed with user privacy and security in mind, ensuring that all operations are performed securely.
Usage: The extension requests necessary permissions transparently and operates within strict security constraints. It does not collect or transmit user data beyond what is required for testing purposes, protecting user information and maintaining trust.
Keyboard-first AI text actions. Select text, press the shortcut, and transform — rewrite, summarize, translate, and more.

Select any text on any page, press a shortcut, and choose your action. The result drops back in place of what you selected. 

Free:
• Rewrite, summarize, fix grammar, explain, shorten, expand, key points
• Translate to 41 languages
• Read aloud in any voice your browser supports
• Runs on Chrome's built-in AI. Fast, private, no API key needed.

Pro: ($5 per month)
• Bring your own AI. Run models locally, or use your own cloud AI keys.
• Always use the latest models. One click pulls your provider's newest releases.
• Create action chains that run one action after another
• Create your own custom actions
• Per-site profiles with ready-made actions, like tweet, reply, and thread on X

Your text stays yours:
Actions run on your device through Chrome's AI. Nothing leaves your computer. If you connect a cloud AI with your own key, your text goes to that service. We never see it. Full policy at clipaction.dev/privacy.

Built-in AI requires Chrome 138+. Other Chromium browsers (Brave, Edge, Opera) work but need a cloud API key or Ollama.
